{{Infobox artifact
| name = Sword Sage's blade
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Sword Sage's blade]] turns things to ice.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Sword Sage's blade]] can hide from lesser artists.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] possesses her master's sword.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
